Vs3/Vl3 N=2 K32 dt/5 live sweep

Generated 2026-07-09 12:52:19. Rerun python3 rice_mele_reference/make_vs3_n2_k32_sweep_fine5_live_report.py to refresh from current files.

Eight cases are shown below. Each case has three compact phase-axis plots: transport, ECG-grid difference, and ECG health. New grid references use initial_pathpad_N2_K32.csv; old K24 grid CSV is used only as a temporary fallback until the new grid sweep finishes. ECG data here use local fine-step factor 0.2, i.e. dt/5 inside s in [0.2,0.3] U [0.7,0.8].
case ECG progress ECG ETA grid progress grid ETA common step ECG-grid Delta P min Re(A+B) res
